title: Analyst, FP&A
description:
Our client is a US MNC in FMCG industry:


Primary Purpose: This role will support key FP&A processes across multiple countries, with a strong focus on APAC CapEx management, expense planning, forecasting, and delivering actionable insights to drive business performance.

Key Responsibilities

The successful candidate will leverage their finance expertise to:

  • Manage APAC CapEx planning and governance across all BUs and categories, including CapEx project review and approval coordination, oversee cash flow planning and depreciation/amortization forecasts aligned with store construction timelines, and ensure proper accounting treatment for asset write-offs and disposals during store closures.
  • Support the monthly close and quarterly outlook processes, ensuring clarity and actionable insights for senior management by utilizing Hyperion Planning (Oracle PBCS) and SAP tools to extract data, develop forecasts, and analyze business trends.
  • Analyze segment-level trends and develop accurate forecasts, focusing on capital expenditure consolidation and optimization as well as operating costs (including Depreciation, Amortization, and Store Pop-up expenses).
  • Deliver accurate segment reporting and partner with business teams to drive profitability, taking ownership of the region’s P&L pillar.
  • Contribute to Long Range Planning (LRP) and Annual Operating Planning (AOP) processes.

The accomplished individual will possess:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Finance or Accounting.
  • 5+ years of finance experience, ideally within FP&A, working with commercial functions and headquarters groups.
  • Strong analytical skills and ability to work across multiple geographies/time zones.
  • Collaborative mindset and high attention to confidentiality.

postedCompany.description:
ONE SEARCH CONSULTING PTE. LTD.

One Search Consulting is a major player in the executive search industry in Asia. We have an extensive network in the region and a growing team of experienced consultants and researchers in Asia. Our clients includes MNCs and growing SMEs and our successful placements span across Asia, especially Singapore, China, Korea, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand and India. Our team has extensive local knowledge of Asian countries and good industry understanding, hence the preferred partner of our clients.

One Search Consulting was established in 2010, with the aim to get the “One Right Hire” for our clients and secure the “One Right Career” for our candidates. We understand that gaining the recognition and respect of both our clients and candidates are our biggest accomplishment as a professional firm.

We are driven by an extraordinary focus on achieving the highest service level and to provide timely and cost-effective solutions for our clients' critical hires. Our past success makes us humble yet strong and confident in facing the future. We aim to continuously exceed ourselves and further intensify our commitment to providing the best solutions to our clients.
